description_long: This is a rustic wooden ladder constructed from two long, round side rails and multiple evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The wood appears weathered, with visible grain and some discoloration, suggesting outdoor or heavy-duty use. Each rung is cylindrical and securely fastened to the side rails, with no visible metal fasteners or reinforcements. The ladder is relatively narrow, making it suitable for single-person use, and the ends of the rails are bluntly cut. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails. The overall appearance is utilitarian, likely intended for access to elevated areas in urban environments such as garages, construction sites, or maintenance zones.
description: A weathered, narrow wooden ladder with round side rails and evenly spaced cylindrical rungs, showing signs of outdoor or heavy-duty use. It lacks visible safety features and is designed for single-person access.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full length of the ladder, with all rungs and both side rails clearly visible.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thin profile of the ladder, with rungs stacked closely and side rails barely visible.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the length and spacing of the rungs, as well as the cylindrical shape of the side rails.
description_view_3: Vertical view emphasizing the height of the ladder and the alignment of the rungs along the side rails.
